title: Parse CSV String Into Records
description: Parse a small CSV string (as might be returned by a model) into a list of dicts.
problem: Write csv_to_records(csv_text) that takes CSV text with a header row and returns a list of dicts mapping header->value (all strings), using comma as delimiter with no quoting.
hint: lines = csv_text.strip().split('\n'); headers = lines[0].split(','); for each remaining line, zip(headers, line.split(',')) into a dict.
